mapper.sql: id, sbv_id, hardware_assembly_pn, hardware_ver, adaptive_level, sort, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_software_build_version_adaptation ( id, sbv_id, hardware_assembly_pn, hardware_ver, adaptive_level, sort, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{sbvId}, #{hardwareAssemblyPn}, #{hardwareVer}, #{adaptiveLevel}, #{sort}, #{description}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO tb_software_build_version_adaptation ( id, sbv_id, hardware_assembly_pn, hardware_ver, adaptive_level, sort, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.sbvId}, #{item.hardwareAssemblyPn}, #{item.hardwareVer}, #{item.adaptiveLevel}, #{item.sort}, #{item.description}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_software_build_version_adaptation t SET
t.sbv_id = #{sbvId},
t.hardware_assembly_pn = #{hardwareAssemblyPn},
t.hardware_ver = #{hardwareVer},
t.adaptive_level = #{adaptiveLevel},
t.sort = #{sort},
t.description = #{description},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_software_build_version_adaptation t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_software_build_version_adaptation t WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_software_build_version_adaptation t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM tb_software_build_version_adaptation t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 ORDER BY t.sort ASC, t.id DESC
SELECT FROM tb_software_build_version_adaptation t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.sbv_id = #{sbvId} ORDER BY t.sort ASC, t.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_software_build_version_adaptation t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_software_build_version_adaptation t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.sbv_id = #{sbvId}
